Patch Set 3:
Initial testing failed:
recovery-small-special3@ldiskfs+DNE Timeout(3708s)
recovery-small-special4@ldiskfs+DNE Timeout(3698s)

I've analyzed Janitor failure for introduced test 144a,
The main test part - MDT failover passed fine within a minute,
Apr 12 07:11:20 oleg243-server kernel: Lustre: Failing over lustre-MDT0000                                                                                                                                    Apr 12 07:11:20 oleg243-server kernel: LustreError: 16648:0:(lprocfs_jobstats.c:137:job_stat_exit()) should not have any items                                                                                Apr 12 07:11:20 oleg243-server kernel: Lustre: server umount lustre-MDT0000 complete  
And it shows fix working.
Test have not finished because of LU-8376, I guess there was a reconnection to OST after MDT failover, and orphan_cleanup deadlocked with osp_precreate_reserve (reserved=392)
>00000004:00080000:1.0:1649765338.790947:0:6817:0:(osp_precreate.c:1534:osp_precreate_reserve()) lustre-OST0000-osc-MDT0001: slow creates, last=[0x280000400:0x581:0x0], next=[0x280000400:0x3f9:0x0], reserved=392, sync_changes=0, sync_rpcs_in_progress=0, status=0

Patch Set 3:

Oleg, Janitor provides a good set of logs, very impressive. May be two cents for improving are 1) attach Lustre logs from /tmp/ for a situation
>Apr 12 07:16:43 oleg243-server kernel: LustreError: dumping log to /tmp/lustre-log.1649762203.6818
2)download_all button

commit.subject: LU-15724 tests: MDT failover hang reproducer
commit.message:
LU-15724 tests: MDT failover hang reproducer

The patch adds recovery-small 144a test to reproduce
MDT failover hang when precreate threads are blocked on objects.

LustreError: 0-0: Forced cleanup waiting for mdt-kjcf05-MDT0001_UUID
namespace with 46 resources in use, (rc=-110)

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=recovery-small env=ONLY=144a
HPE-bug-id: LUS-10750
Signed-off-by: Alexander Boyko <alexander.boyko@hpe.com>
Change-Id: I2743a1b5c8911d6982b527f7e7b7bbbaf310cd04
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/47006
